markets.rules_primary: If Bushido Wildcats wins map 2 in the ESL Challenger League Europe Cup #1 2026: MOUZ NXT vs. Bushido Wildcats CS2 match originally scheduled for Jul 12, 2026 at 9:00 AM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
